# Pull Request

## What does this PR do?

<!-- A short description of your change. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 📝 Documentation / guide update
- [ ] 🎪 Event / workshop / hackathon content
- [ ] 📚 New resource
- [ ] 🎨 Template or asset improvement
- [ ] 🐛 Fix (typo, broken link, formatting)
- [ ] 🔧 Repository maintenance

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #12 — please open an issue first for anything non-trivial. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I read the [Contributing Guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My change follows the file naming and Markdown conventions
- [ ] Links I added or changed work (relative links within the repo)
- [ ] Images are compressed and placed in `photos/` or `assets/`
- [ ] This PR has one focused purpose
